title: Remove Toyota Crysta and Urbania from fleet showcase

requirements.summary: Remove Toyota Crysta from the fleet showcase section
acceptanceCriteria: Toyota Crysta is no longer displayed in the fleet showcase grid
No broken image references for Crysta remain in the component
The fleet showcase grid displays only three remaining vehicles (Dzire, Kia Carens, Etios)

file_operations.description: Remove the Toyota Crysta vehicle object from the vehicles array, including its image reference to frontend/public/assets/generated/crysta.dim_800x600.png, title, category, and capacity properties. Ensure the remaining vehicles array maintains proper TypeScript typing and the grid layout continues to render correctly with four vehicles instead of five.

requirements.summary: Remove Urbania from the fleet showcase section
acceptanceCriteria: Urbania is no longer displayed in the fleet showcase grid
No broken image references for Urbania remain in the component
The fleet showcase maintains proper responsive grid layout with remaining vehicles

file_operations.description: Remove the Urbania vehicle object from the vehicles array, including its image reference to frontend/public/assets/generated/urbania.dim_800x600.png, title, category, and capacity properties. Verify that the grid layout styling (likely using Tailwind grid classes) properly accommodates three vehicles and maintains responsive behavior across different screen sizes.
